Daniel J. Faiella Insurance Advisors — Medicare & Insurance Broker in Carson City, Nevada

Independent, licensed insurance advisor and educator based in Carson City and serving all of Northern Nevada. Daniel helps individuals and families understand and compare Medicare (Advantage, Supplement/Medigap and Part D), life insurance, long-term care, and retirement income and annuities — shopping A+ rated carriers so you get unbiased advice at no cost to you.

Service areas

  • Carson City Medicare & insurance broker
  • Reno & Sparks Medicare & insurance broker
  • Lake Tahoe (NV) Medicare & insurance broker
  • Minden & Gardnerville Medicare & insurance broker
  • Dayton Medicare & insurance broker
  • All Northern Nevada service areas

Contact

Call or text 775-315-5572 · Email daniel@faiellaadvisors.com · Based in Carson City, Nevada. The first conversation is always free and no-pressure.
